name: emotion-tile
description: Ein einzelnes Objekt in großem Negativraum für Breath-Folien und Closing-Beats
style_instructions: Style: Minimalist editorial photograph or still life, single subject, expansive negative space. Color palette: muted monochromatic with one subtle color note. Lighting: soft, natural, slightly directional. Mood: contemplative, quiet.
composition: ONE object or motif, positioned off-center (upper-right or lower-left third). 70% of the frame is negative space. Background is a single calm color or very subtle texture. Object is intimate in scale, not monumental.
negative: no text, no logos, no people, no cluttered backgrounds, no multiple subjects, no saturated colors, no cartoon, no 3D, no AI-glow
